headline: As Trump Admin Warns on Airport Closures, Should You Sell Delta Airlines Stock?

headline: ICE agents will be deployed to U.S. airports on Monday: Homan
summary: The shutdown at the Department of Homeland Security has caused massive pileups at airport security lines.
